title: UnderCraft
description: A Undertale mod adding souls and more!!!!
body:
A Minecraft mod that adds the souls from Undertale. Determination, Integrity, Kindness, Patience, Bravery, Justice and Perseverance. This mod also adds "The Pure Soul" a soul made from all of the other 7 souls with unbelivable power. The determination soul gives the user strength 2 and resistance 2, the integrity soul stops most mobs from moving or attacking and gives the player jump boots and slow falling, the kindness soul heals the user for 10 seconds, the patience soul stops the user from moving but also stops the player from taking damage, bravery gives the user swiftness and fire resistance, justice is like a long range weapon similar to a bow, to make the ammunition you simply have to put the justice soul or the pure soul in a crafting menu creating 1 stack of ammunition for the justice soul and the pure soul and also does not get rid of the soul, the perseverance soul gives you resistance, fire resistance, water breathing and regeneration and finally "The Pure Soul" is a combination of all of the different souls and gives the user the ability to fly when it is in the inventory of the user. And MORE!!!!!!!!!!!! [​Check update log for more information.]

Please use JEI for recipes.

[​I made this mod before I found out there was another mod called "UnderCraft".]
